decision.evidence: Local full-suite wall-clock measurement at 524 manifest cases: 63.33 s, above the 60 s interactive threshold. CI therefore runs a four-shard matrix; the unfiltered timingCommand remains the local full-suite gate. Per-shard evidence for the selected four-shard matrix (1 warmup + 5 timed runs each, nearest-rank p95, 2026-07-12, after the bird2 stress-fixture rebalance): shard 0 = 16.67 s, shard 1 = 20.56 s, shard 2 = 8.24 s, shard 3 = 13.29 s; maximum 20.56 s, within the 45 s shard target. Same-protocol comparison runs on the same day measured the unsharded suite at 58.82 s and a two-shard split at max 33.91 s (shards 24.94 s / 33.91 s); the reviewed four-shard decision is retained for headroom against the interactive trigger rather than re-decided on a borderline re-measurement.
